label: Strategy Classification
definition: Classification of a strategic approach or positioning.

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Analyst prediction about future viability or success.

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Verified historical outcome of a prediction or situation.

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology capability, quality, or status.

label: Framework Factor
definition: Factor within an analytical framework or model.

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Analyst or expert judgment without formal data backing.

label: Manageability-Availability-Performance
definition: HP framework for enterprise IT requirements: Manageability, Availability, Performance.

label: Simplified Enterprise Computing
definition: HP/Microsoft joint enterprise NT initiative announced March 1997.

label: Total Cost of Ownership
definition: Total cost metric for enterprise computing systems including acquisition, management, and support.

label: White Paper
definition: Aberdeen strategic analysis/opinion paper; longer-form than product profile.
